summary: Comprehensive end-to-end testing of Sierra Leone Seed Tracker application completed. Backend APIs are 94.7% functional with 18/19 tests passing. Frontend UI is fully responsive and functional across all pages with proper data integration. Only minor dropdown interaction issues found that don't impact core functionality.

minor_bugs.issue: Returns 403 instead of expected 401 for unauthorized access
minor_bugs.impact: Very low - both codes indicate authentication failure

ui_bugs.issue: Overlay interception preventing clicks in registration form dropdowns

issues: FAQ page missing data-testid='faq-title' attribute for testing

passed_tests: Landing page loads with hero section and all content sections
Navigation works across all pages (Catalogues, Marketplace, About, Login, Register)
Marketplace displays seed cards with proper data and filtering
Catalogues shows seed varieties in table format with search
Dashboard analytics and charts display correctly
Seeds API returns proper data with filtering (region, crop, search)
Analytics API returns correct statistics and aggregations
Mobile responsiveness works on 390x844 and 768x1024 viewports
Error handling displays proper messages (Invalid email or password)
Interactive map integration with Leaflet working
Database seeded with 8 sample seeds and 3 registrations
CRUD operations for seeds working with authentication
Proper authorization checks on protected routes
Sierra Leone color scheme (green #1EB53A, blue #0072C6, gold #DAA520) implemented
Responsive grid layouts and mobile navigation
